message: 🌱 Make all greeting links open in new tabs

files.patch: @@ -12,28 +12,28 @@ on: **Before your PR can be merged, please ensure:** - ✅ **DCO Sign-off** - All commits must be signed off with `git commit -s` to certify the [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/) + ✅ **DCO Sign-off** - All commits must be signed off with `git commit -s` to certify the Developer Certificate of Origin ✅ **PR Title** - Must start with an emoji: ✨ (feature), 🐛 (bug fix), 📖 (docs), 🌱 (infra/tests), ⚠️ (breaking change) **Getting Started with KubeStellar:** - - 📦 [Quick Start](https://kubestellar.io/docs/user-guide/quick-start) - - 📖 [Documentation](https://docs.kubestellar.io/) - - 🎬 [YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing](https://www.youtube.com/@kubestellar) + - 📦 Quick Start + - 📖 Documentation + - 🎬 YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing **Contributor Resources:** - - 📚 [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook) - - 🪜 [Contributor Ladder](https://kubestellar.io/ladder) - - 🎓 [Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC)](https://kubestellar.io/programs) - - 💬 [Slack - #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M) + - 📚 Contributor Handbook + - 🪜 Contributor Ladder + - 🎓 Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC) + - 💬 Slack - #kubestellar-dev --- 🌟 **Help KubeStellar Grow - We Need Adopters!** Our roadmap is driven entirely by adopter feedback. Whether you're using KubeStellar yourself or know someone who could benefit from multi-cluster Kubernetes: - 📋 **[Take our Multi-Cluster Survey](https://forms.gle/VsG6aJpikf3NKjJH6)** - Share your use cases and help shape our direction! + 📋 Take our Multi-Cluster Survey - Share your use cases and help shape our direction! --- @@ -52,20 +52,20 @@ on: This will automatically assign the issue to you. Use `/unassign` to remove yourself. **Find Issues to Work On:** - - 🏷️ [`good first issue`](https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22) - Great for new contributors - - 🙋 [`help wanted`](https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22help+wanted%22) - Community help needed - - 🔍 [CLOTributor](https://clotributor.dev/search?project=kubestellar) - CNCF issue finder + - 🏷️ good first issue - Great for new contributors + - 🙋 help wanted - Community help needed + - 🔍 CLOTributor - CNCF issue finder **Getting Started with KubeStellar:** - - 📦 [Quick Start](https://kubestellar.io/docs/user-guide/quick-start) - - 📖 [Documentation](https://docs.kubestellar.io/) - - 🎬 [YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing](https://www.youtube.com/@kubestellar) + - 📦 Quick Start + - 📖 Documentation + - 🎬 YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing **Contributor Resources:** - - 📚 [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook) - - 🪜 [Contributor Ladder](https://kubestellar.io/ladder) - - 🎓 [Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC)](https://kubestellar.io/programs) - - 💬 [Slack - #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M) + - 📚 Contributor Handbook + - 🪜 Contributor Ladder + - 🎓 Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC) + - 💬 Slack - #kubestellar-dev **For Maintainers - Label Commands:** - `/good-first-issue` - Mark this issue as suitable for new contributors @@ -77,7 +77,7 @@ on: Our roadmap is driven entirely by adopter feedback. Whether you're using KubeStellar yourself or know organizations that could benefit from multi-cluster Kubernetes: - 📋 **[Take our Multi-Cluster Survey](https://forms.gle/VsG6aJpikf3NKjJH6)** - Share your use cases and help shape our direction! + 📋 Take our Multi-Cluster Survey - Share your use cases and help shape our direction! ---
